name: videogen-examples
description: Example full-stack apps using the VideoGen API.
author: VideoGen, Inc.

scripts.generate: rm -rf /tmp/vg-examples-generate && git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/video-gen/videogen-examples.git /tmp/vg-examples-generate && rsync -a --delete --exclude='.git' --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='.next' --exclude='__pycache__' --exclude='.venv' --exclude='dist' ./ /tmp/vg-examples-generate/ && cd /tmp/vg-examples-generate && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || (git commit -m 'Sync from monorepo' && git push) && rm -rf /tmp/vg-examples-generate
